name: Stick Fortress
author: Poki
description: Stick Fortress is a tower defense game that pits you against relentless waves of enemies determined to breach your base! Strategically assign different soldiers to different positions within your fortress. Your valiant army will attack the enemies automatically, but it is up to you to ensure they are equipped to fight. With each victory, you'll earn coins that can be used to upgrade both your soldiers and your wall. It is time to defend your fortress! How to play Stick Fortress? Click and drag units to your base. Who created Stick Fortress? Stick Fortress is created by Kool Games. Play their other games on Poki: Skibidi Shooter ! How can I play Stick Fortress for free? You can play Stick Fortress for free on Poki. Can I play Stick Fortress on mobile devices and desktop? Stick Fortress can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
